rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §7.112 governs post-service lobbying restrictions for former State Board of Education members regarding instructional materials publishers. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects.
quote: A former member of the State Board of Education who is employed by or otherwise receives compensation from a publisher of instructional materials may not, before the second anniversary of the date on which the person last served as a member of the State Board of Education:
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this instructional materials ethics statute.
